_comment: Composite deck for the @kitsoki GitHub-loop demo (epic kitsoki-github-agent, demo slice #6). One slidey presentation deck bracketing the two recorded act clips with title/section slides. The two `video` scenes embed the DEFAULT-PACE shippable MP4s recorded by github-demo-issuepr.spec.ts (Act 1, the GitHub side) and github-demo-webviewer.spec.ts (Act 2, the kitsoki side); each act clip ships a sibling <act>.mp4.chapters.json so `chapters: auto` derives deck-styled lower-thirds with no conversion. Render with host.slidey.render(spec_path, format: mp4) (or the slidey CLI) -> narrated MP4 + .chapters.json sidecar. `src` paths resolve relative to THIS deck JSON, so ../baked/<act>.mp4 are the staged act clips. meta.mode:pitch is REQUIRED (without it every frame renders blank). meta.resolution matches the 1600x900 Playwright capture viewport so video scenes letterbox-clean under fit:contain.

scenes.title: One loop, two sides
scenes.subtitle: A mention becomes a job becomes a PR — no App, no webhook, no LLM
scenes.narration: Watch the @ kitsoki GitHub loop, end to end.

scenes.title: The GitHub side
scenes.subtitle: Issues and PRs, driven by @ kitsoki

narration.text: A user mentions kitsoki on a bug-labelled issue.

scenes.title: The kitsoki side
scenes.subtitle: The web viewer and the operator drive

narration.text: Click the run link and the live trace streams.

scenes.title: Mention to merge
scenes.subtitle: GitHub thread and kitsoki UI, the same job
scenes.narration: One mention, one job, one linkable run.
